name: SkyN3t continuous improvement
description: Periodic health check and small shippable improvements to the SkyN3t orchestrator repo (fleet improves PROJECTS_DIR scaffolds separately).

prompts.prompt:
You are improving the SkyN3t orchestrator repo (Choaterboater/skyn3t-orchestrator).

## Session start
1. Read docs/CONTINUE.md — focus on Next priorities and Cursor + Fleet dual loop.
2. If data/cursor_tasks.json exists, take the highest-priority task (or run: Process cursor_tasks.json).
3. Run ./scripts/cursor_improve.sh for smoke (fleet API + pytest subset).

## Scope
- Improve THIS repo (skyn3t/, web UI, tests, docs) — NOT PROJECTS_DIR scaffolds.
- The autonomous fleet handles generated projects; you handle orchestrator quality.

## Quality bar
- Prefer one small shippable diff per run.
- Before claiming done:
  source .venv/bin/activate
  ruff check skyn3t tests
  pytest tests/ -q --ignore=tests/test_observability.py
- After cortex/web changes also run:
  pytest tests/test_agent_fleet.py tests/test_continuous_improvement.py -q

## Priorities (when queue empty)
Pick from docs/CONTINUE.md: messaging channel parity, worktree helper, dashboard UX, fleet idle bugs, Hermes gaps.

## PR rule
Open a PR only if all tests pass. Never commit secrets.

## Finish
Update docs/CONTINUE.md if you completed a priority. Remove or dequeue the cursor task you finished.
